title: Quantum Gravity and Information: The Frontiers
description: Explore the deep connections between quantum information and quantum gravity. Learn about the black hole information paradox, Page curves, island formula, and how quantum information concepts are reshaping our understanding of spacetime.
learningObjectives: Explain the black hole information paradox and why it matters
Understand Hawking radiation and the information problem
Analyze the Page curve and its resolution via islands
Explore the connection between entropy and geometry (generalized entropy)
Understand quantum extremal surfaces and the island formula
Discuss the implications for the nature of spacetime
